reason: Successfully tested agent chat functionality: navigated to app, found agent, verified idle status, sent math question, received response with correct answer.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Successfully loaded the Gamut app home page with sidebar displaying available agents.
Clicked on "QA-20260629-211211-3oai" agent in sidebar — Successfully navigated to agent detail page and entered chat session.
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Agent status confirmed as "idle" in the top right status indicator.
Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message successfully typed in input field and submitted using send button.
Waited up to 3 minutes for response — Agent responded within 5 seconds with the complete message "2 + 2 = 4".
Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot — Response clearly displays "2 + 2 = 4" in the chat view, confirming the answer includes the number "4" as required.
